title: Nursery Rhyme. CXXVII. Scholastic.
content:
Doctor Faustus was a good man,
        He whipt his scholars now and then;
        When he whipp'd them he made them dance,
        Out of Scotland into France,
        Out of France into Spain,
        And then he whipp'd them back again!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CXXVII. Scholastic."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
